overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic Japanese-inspired urban plaza at night. The scene features vibrant teal and magenta neon lighting, wet reflective pavement, traditional red paper lanterns mixed with holographic advertisements, and NPCs interacting around a food cart and bar.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway transitioning to open plaza

events.description: exits covered walkway with traditional roof into open plaza with glowing trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered arcade with teal neon lighting, approaching an open plaza area

entered.detail: traditional wooden roof structure with grid pattern and teal neon strip lighting along beams
glowing cyan neon tubes running along structural beams and floor edges
traditional Japanese red paper lanterns hanging from the roof structure
large floating digital advertisement with bright colors visible through the walkway opening
tree with illuminated pink cherry blossoms and wrapped fairy lights

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a covered walkway with traditional Japanese architectural elements mixed with cyberpunk neon lighting. Teal neon strips line the ceiling beams and floor edges while red paper lanterns hang overhead. The camera moves forward, transitioning from the sheltered corridor toward an open plaza where glowing cherry blossom trees become visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with food vendor

events.description: approaches food cart with large umbrella and begins to circle around it

agents.ego_description: walking toward a food cart vendor while observing the plaza surroundings and NPCs

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind food cart preparing items under illuminated umbrella
customer waiting at the cart, facing the vendor

entered.detail: street food vendor cart with large black and yellow umbrella, illuminated menu display, and cooking equipment
wet tiled ground reflecting the neon lights and tree illuminations
outdoor bar structure with bright magenta purple neon lighting and counter stools

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide plaza with wet pavement reflecting vibrant neon lights. A food cart with a large illuminated umbrella becomes the focal point as the camera approaches. Glowing cherry blossom trees line the plaza while a purple neon bar becomes visible in the distance. NPCs gather around the vendor cart, creating a lively night market atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza center with food cart and pedestrian traffic

events.description: completes circling the food cart and continues walking toward the purple neon bar
lighting shifts from teal dominant to magenta purple as approaching the bar area

agents.ego_description: circling around the food cart to observe different angles, then moving toward the neon bar while passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: customer in patterned jacket standing at food cart, interacting with vendor

entered.detail: traditional white paper lanterns with Japanese characters hanging above the bar counter
tall round stools lined up along the purple illuminated bar counter

segments.scene_description: The camera circles the food cart, revealing NPC customers interacting with the vendor, then moves away from the cart toward a brightly lit purple neon bar. The lighting atmosphere shifts from teal to magenta as the bar becomes the dominant visual element. Pedestrians walk through the plaza while the wet pavement continues to reflect the vibrant neon colors.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor neon bar with counter seating

events.description: arrives at the purple neon bar counter with illuminated Japanese lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking past the neon bar while observing patrons seated at the counter and the detailed bar interior

notable_agents.action: female patron with red hair sitting on bar stool, facing the bartender
male patron standing at the bar counter, ordering from the bartender

entered.detail: tall cylindrical pillar displaying rotating holographic advertisements with bright colors

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on the purple neon bar with traditional Japanese paper lanterns hanging above the counter. The camera moves along the bar, showing patrons seated on stools and interacting with the bartender. The lighting is dominated by intense magenta neon reflecting off the wet ground, while holographic advertisements glow in the background. The scene maintains the cyberpunk atmosphere with the mix of traditional and futuristic elements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, neon-lit corridor into a vibrant, open-air urban plaza dominated by magenta light. It begins under a covered walkway where teal neon strips and red paper lanterns frame the path, moving forward as the shelter gives way to a wide plaza featuring glowing cherry blossom trees. As the camera enters the open space, the focus shifts toward a lively food cart with an illuminated umbrella and NPCs gathering on wet, reflective pavement. The scene then expands as the camera circles the vendor and glides toward a brightly lit purple neon bar, causing the overall lighting atmosphere to shift from teal to intense magenta. Finally, the movement settles along the bar's counter, passing seated patrons and traditional lanterns while holographic advertisements glow in the background.
